title: Rich Fluffy Malaysian Peanut Brittle Bowl
description: A quick, egg‑free Malaysian dessert featuring a fluffy coconut milk base crowned with crunchy peanut brittle.
instructions: Place brown sugar in a heavy saucepan over medium heat and stir until it melts and turns a deep amber color.
Add coconut oil and whisk until fully incorporated.
Stir in roasted peanuts and cook for 1-2 minutes until the peanuts are evenly coated and fragrant.
Transfer the peanut mixture to a greased silicone mat and let it cool until brittle forms.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together coconut milk, vanilla extract, salt, and tapioca starch until smooth.
Heat the coconut milk mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it begins to thicken, about 4 minutes.
Fold in shredded coconut, toasted sesame seeds, and broken brittle pieces, then divide the fluffy mixture into bowls and serve immediately.
